items.title: HHS launches broad effort to expand and speed up clinical trials
items.description:
The Trump administration is responding to a drumbeat of calls from the biotech and pharma industries to modernize and expedite clinical trials with a sweeping initiative across HHS.

items.title: Merck's IBD drug from $10.8B Prometheus deal claims its first Phase 3 win
items.description:
Merck’s $10.8 billion buyout of Prometheus Biosciences is showing its first signs of paying off.

items.title: AbbVie makes $10.9B move for Apogee's long-acting I&I drug candidates
items.description:
AbbVie is making its largest post-Allergan acquisition in a $10.9 billion move for immunology biotech Apogee Therapeutics.

 Apogee's long-acting IL-13 drug, called zumilokibart, is slated to enter Phase 3 for eczema later this year. The ...

items.title: STAT+: Closely watched Pfizer lung cancer drug falls short in clinical trial
items.description: Pfizer said an experimental drug it hoped could replace a widely used chemotherapy in one of the most common forms of lung cancer fell short in a clinical trial.

items.title: STAT+: Definium LSD therapy helped patients with major depression in late-stage trial
items.description: Definium Therapeutics said that its LSD therapy helped patients with major depression in its first Phase 3 trial, bringing the psychedelic drug closer to a potential approval.

items.title: STAT+: FDA reverses course on Regenxbio’s childhood gene therapy after rejection
items.description: The FDA will reconsider approving Regenxbio's experimental gene therapy for a deadly and rare childhood brain disorder it rejected just four months ago.
